completed_tasks.name: Auth UI + machine forms + settings pages

remaining_tasks.name: Human verification: end-to-end Docker Compose test

blockers.description: Rootless Docker cannot start containers — SSH session lacks systemd user scope for cgroup creation
blockers.workaround: PAM fix applied (UsePAM yes + pam_systemd.so added to /etc/pam.d/sshd, sshd restarted). Need to restart tmux under a NEW SSH session for the fix to take effect. Current tmux server is still in old ssh.service cgroup.

human_actions_pending.action: Restart tmux session to pick up systemd user scope from PAM fix
human_actions_pending.context: Disconnect SSH, reconnect (new session gets pam_systemd scope), start fresh tmux, then run: cd ~/locus && docker compose --profile dev up -d

decisions.decision: Fixed TS2532 errors with optional chaining in ClaudeCodeSettings.tsx and CredentialSettings.tsx
decisions.rationale: Object possibly undefined when indexing result maps

decisions.decision: Applied PAM fix (UsePAM yes + pam_systemd.so) instead of polkit rules or cgroupfs
decisions.rationale: Most secure approach, matches original VPS setup guide intent

next_action: Reconnect SSH (fresh session with systemd scope) → restart tmux → docker compose --profile dev up -d → verify app loads at localhost:5173 → run phase verification
context_notes: All 7 plans executed successfully across 4 waves. All code is written and committed. The only remaining work is: (1) restart tmux to pick up the PAM fix, (2) docker compose up, (3) manual end-to-end verification, (4) phase verification via gsd-verifier. The .env file and .gitignore are new untracked files that should be committed (but NOT .env — it has secrets).
